summary: Auth layer testing for ScreenSolve iteration 4. Tested route protection redirects, auth screen rendering, unconfigured Supabase error messages, and backend JWT middleware responses.
test_credentials: No valid Supabase credentials — tested unconfigured behavior only
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth layer fully wired. ProtectedRoute redirects unauthenticated users to /login. Backend verify_jwt returns 503 when SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET is blank. All auth screens render with correct data-testid attributes. When Supabase env vars are configured, end-to-end login/register flows should be tested.

backend: POST /api/analyze no token → 503 'Authentication is not configured. Set SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET.'
frontend: /login renders all elements: email, password, submit, google-login, register-link, forgot-password-link
Login form submit → error 'Authentication is not configured. Set REACT_APP_SUPABASE_URL and REACT_APP_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.'
/register renders register-screen, submit shows same unconfigured error
